creator: asami@vader.cs.berkeley.edu
text:
I see.  Well, let's not worry too much about it, there are lots of
other ports that does it.  Besides, if we are going to fix it, it will
be by changing the ports framework, not adding a few dozen lines to
individual Makefiles.

I took your new port and committed it as x11/fvwm2.  I think there is
no reason why properly internationalized ports have to be classified
specially.  I removed some references to Japanese (in the CATEGORIES
line and pkg/*.jp files) and also cleaned up the Makefile a bit
(checking for USE_GMAKE here is pointless...please read the targets if 
you are going to copy rules from bsd.port.mk).  Thanks!
